name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. Blocks 100% of UVA and UVB rays.

name: Beach Straw Hat
description: Wide brim straw hat perfect for beach days. Lightweight and breathable.

name: Waterproof Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Water resistant sunscreen providing 8 hours of protection. Dermatologist tested.

name: Floral Summer Dress
description: Light floral print dress made from breathable cotton. Perfect for summer days out.

name: Inflatable Beach Floatie
description: Giant inflatable flamingo floatie for pool and beach fun. Fits one adult.

name: Insulated Water Bottle
description: Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours. BPA free stainless steel with leak proof lid.

name: Flip Flops

name: Portable Beach Umbrella
description: Wind resistant beach umbrella with UPF 50+ protection. Easy to set up.
